$comment: Hand-curated OpenAPI metadata per route. Keys are 'METHOD /path'. scripts/generate-openapi.js merges these on top of the auto-generated spec on every run. Edit summaries here, not in docs/openapi.yml — that file is auto-generated and your changes will be overwritten.

GET /healthz.description: Returns 200 if the process is alive. Cheap (no dependency checks). Railway / load balancers hit this every few seconds.

GET /readyz.description: Returns 200 if the server can accept traffic. Probes Supabase + Anthropic + Inngest with a 1500ms total budget. Returns 503 if any critical dep is unhealthy.

GET /metrics.description: Returns the current process metrics in Prometheus text format (version 0.0.4). Scraped by Datadog / Grafana / Prometheus. No auth — mount behind reverse-proxy auth if exposing publicly.

POST /webhook/paddle-webhook.description: Handles subscription lifecycle: activated, updated, canceled, paused, resumed, past_due, trialing. Also transaction.completed + transaction.refunded. Verifies Paddle HMAC signature with 5-minute timestamp tolerance, then dedupes via webhook_events(provider='paddle', event_id) before any side-effect.

POST /webhook/stripe-webhook.description: Legacy Stripe integration kept for in-flight subscriptions. New customers use Paddle. Verifies Stripe signature + dedupes via webhook_events(provider='stripe', event_id).

POST /webhook/instant-content.summary: Generate one full week of content on demand
POST /webhook/instant-content.description: Used by the dashboard's 'Generate now' button. Fires the full WF1 pipeline + emails the customer when complete (~90 seconds end-to-end). Rate-limited per business. Costs ~$0.30-0.80 in Claude credits per call.

POST /webhook/content-generate.description: Single concept → image (Higgsfield) → caption + score → save as draft. Mounted with cost-guard middleware. Per-business rate limit.

POST /webhook/content-approved.description: Marks generated_content.status='approved' and triggers publish pipeline to connected platforms. Customer triggers this from the approval email link or the dashboard.

POST /webhook/ad-optimizer-daily-audit.description: Cron-only endpoint hit by Inngest at 08:00 UTC. Audits every active campaign and applies scale/pause/keep/optimize/refresh_creative decisions. dryRun=true returns the audit without applying. See services/ad-optimizer/ and docs/adr/0003.

POST /webhook/pacing-alerts-evaluate-all.description: Evaluates ad-spend pacing per campaign and fires alerts when projected month-end spend deviates >25% from the customer's daily_budget * 30 target.

POST /webhook/weekly-scorecard-all.description: Generates the weekly scorecard for every active business: HTML email + Claude narrative commentary (Growth/Agency tier) routed through quality-gate. Free tier: plain numbers, no LLM. See services/weekly-scorecard/.

GET /webhook/oauth/meta/start.description: Requires Supabase JWT (Authorization header OR ?token= for browser redirects). Verifies the authenticated user owns businessId via the businesses table before issuing a signed state token. State binds businessId + userId + nonce + timestamp. Redirects to Facebook consent screen. See ADR-0002.

GET /webhook/oauth/meta/callback.description: Verifies signed state, exchanges code → short-lived → long-lived 60d token, fetches accessible ad accounts + pages + IG accounts, persists tokens (encrypted at rest via lib/oauthCrypto).

GET /webhook/oauth/google/start.description: Same auth model as Meta start. Requests adwords + userinfo scopes with access_type=offline + prompt=consent to guarantee a refresh_token.

GET /webhook/oauth/google/callback.description: Exchanges code → refresh_token (long-lived). Lists accessible Google Ads customer IDs. Persists encrypted token + primary customer ID.

POST /webhook/meta-deauthorize.summary: Meta App revoke callback (required by Meta)
POST /webhook/meta-deauthorize.description: Meta calls this when a user revokes our App. Verifies signed_request HMAC, logs the event, returns confirmation URL. See routes/meta-compliance.js.

POST /webhook/meta-data-deletion.description: Mandatory per Meta Platform Terms. Verifies HMAC, creates data_deletion_requests row, emails admin (30-day SLA), returns confirmation URL.

POST /webhook/data-deletion-request.description: Customer or non-customer can request data deletion. Rate-limited to prevent abuse. Creates pending row in data_deletion_requests, emails admin, emails requester with confirmation.

GET /api/data-deletion-status.summary: Public status check for a deletion request
GET /api/data-deletion-status.description: Returns status (pending|complete|not_found) for a confirmation code. No auth — the code itself is the auth.

POST /api/checkout.description: Creates a Paddle Transaction for the requested plan and returns the checkout_url + transaction_id. Frontend opens checkout_url in a Paddle modal.

GET /api/billing/plans.description: Returns the plan tier definitions (free / starter / growth / agency) with prices, features, and feature-gate caps. Used by the pricing page + upgrade prompts.

POST /api/onboarding/save.description: Customer fills the onboarding form → this endpoint upserts business_profiles, syncs core fields to businesses, computes profile_score (0-100), stashes the profile in Pinecone for retrieval. Returns profile_score + missing_fields list.

GET /api/onboarding/profile/:userId.description: Returns the merged businesses + business_profiles row. Used by the dashboard's profile editor.

POST /webhook/cost-report.description: Returns per-business + per-skill + per-model spend totals for the requested window. Auth via x-webhook-secret. See services/observability/cost-tracker.js.

POST /webhook/cold-start-trigger.description: Auto-fired on first paid Paddle activation. Walks the customer through industry-classify → competitor-detect → brand-voice → Soul ID → concepts → campaign launch → content → AI-SEO. See services/cold-start/.

POST /webhook/wf-content-performance-fee.description: Inngest target — fired 24h after publish by contentPublishFeedback24h. Pulls live Meta post insights, scores the content, and stashes high-performing captions in Pinecone for retrieval. See services/inngest/.
